query:
SELECT planName, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(monthlyCost) as total, MIN(monthlyCost) as minCost, MAX(monthlyCost) as maxCost
FROM services
WHERE planName LIKE '%Microsoft Teams%'
   OR planName LIKE '%UCXcel Professional%'
   OR planName LIKE '%UCXcel Voicemail%'
   OR planName LIKE '%UCXcel Virtual%'
   OR planName LIKE '%Residential%'
   OR planName LIKE '%Premium User%'
   OR planName LIKE '%SmileTel Premium%'
   OR planName LIKE '%SmileTel Professional%'
GROUP BY planName ORDER BY planName;

FROM services

   OR planName LIKE '%UCXcel Voicemail%'

   OR planName LIKE '%Residential%'
   OR planName LIKE '%Premium User%'
   OR planName LIKE '%SmileTel Premium%'
